templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via USP and USPS. Once shipped it will take 4-8 for domestic orders and 5-7 for international orders.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.talbots.com/returns/returns.html

templates.name: How do I receive free shipping with my Premier Card?
templates.content: Premier Talbots Credit Cardholders receive free standard shipping (arrives 3-7 business days after shipping date) on all talbots.com and catalog purchases to one shipping address within the US or Canada, when a valid Talbots Credit Card is used as method of payment. Discount will appear on the Review page in Checkout. Additional charges may apply if you choose express delivery and/or multiple shipping addresses. All applicable duties and taxes will be paid by the package recipient.

templates.name: Where can I redeem my e-Gift Card or Gift Card?
templates.content: A Talbots e-Gift Card or Gift Card may be redeemed for merchandise at talbots.com, through catalogs, and at any Talbots, Talbots Outlet or Clearance store in the United States and Canada.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.talbots.com/clothing/classic-awards/classic-awards

templates.name: How do I delete my Talbots account?
templates.content: We're sorry to hear that you wish to delete your Talbots account. Please call us at (800) 992-9010 to proceed.

templates.name: Where do I mail my Talbots Credit Card payment?
templates.content:
For Talbots Credit Card accounts issued by Comenity Bank, payments can be mailed to:
Comenity Bank, P.O. Box 650968, Dallas, TX 75265-0968

templates.name: What's the difference between Misses and Plus sizing?
templates.content: Our Misses styles are proportioned for women 5'4" -5'8" who wear sizes 2-18. Our Plus styles are designed specifically to fit and flatter women 5'4" -5'8" who wear sizes 14W-24W. Our Plus Petite styles are designed for women under 5'4" who wear sizes 14WP-22WP.

templates.name: Sizing (clothes)
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: What are your current coupons, offers and promotions?
templates.content: You can find more details on our deals, discounts, and offer codes available today at Talbots here: https://talbots.attn.tv/afqASN6DXsSN

templates.name: Price Adjustment
templates.content:
We will gladly adjust the price of an item if the price decreases within 14 days of the original purchase or shipment date. Price adjustments will be made based on the current selling price to the original method of payment, unless a merchandise credit is preferred. Please note that final Sale purchases are not eligible for price adjustments. Additional exceptions may apply. 

The best way to move forward with your request is to email us directly at customer.service@talbots.com. Our team is happy to help!
